comment: Shared artifact microcopy registry (TDD §10.11). Edition source-gate labels live in the selected edition strings resource; bundle-only wording lives in bundle-manifest.json. Approvals bind to wording digests. Enum presentation entries must exactly cover every closed enum value that reaches the UI (guardrail 13). The counsel legend is a counsel-approvable normative default (TDD §17.4).
counselLegend: CONFIDENTIAL — ATTORNEY WORK PRODUCT — PREPARED FOR US COUNSEL REVIEW. This navigator presents unfiled draft claim-strategy material relating to PCT/IB2025/051755 (published as WO 2025/181623 A1). Do not distribute outside the engagement.
standingDisclaimer: Draft navigation aid generated from claim-set {editionVersion} and PCT/IB2025/051755 as filed (WO 2025/181623 A1). Mappings are author-recorded candidate associations for counsel review — not a written-description, priority, or any other legal opinion. Fragments marked "counsel review required" carry no recorded candidate passage. Claim-level gates concern the complete claim and are quoted from the claim-set document. Anchor references are internal navigation labels, not official numbering, and must not be cited. This edition presents one candidate strategy; it does not compare strategies or recommend a filing choice.

status.counsel-review-required: No candidate passage recorded — counsel review required

dispositions.carried-at-required-scope: Gate recorded at its required scope
dispositions.carried-at-fragment-fallback: Gate recorded on the limitation — no candidate target recorded
dispositions.no-target-recorded: No candidate target recorded for this gate

migrationReasons.endpoint-changed: claim, ancestor-claim, or gate endpoint changed

generalizationCodes.beyond-literal-example: The recorded passage supports this language by example; the claim wording is broader than the literal example.

ui.noCandidateNotice: No candidate passage recorded — counsel review required
ui.indexedBy: Indexed by {n} claim fragment(s) of this edition: {label}
ui.pinnedFilesHeader: Pinned files (SHA-256, abbreviated display; full digests in the machine-readable block)
ui.provenanceSummary: canonVersion {canonVersion} · schema {schemaVersion} · declared release timestamp {timestamp} · {claims} claims / {units} units / {blocks} disclosure blocks
ui.guidanceNoteLabel: Guidance note from the claim-set document (not claim text)
ui.viewportNote: Designed for viewports of {width}×{height} and above; panes stack below the minimum.
ui.previewWatermark: PREVIEW — NOT FOR QA OR DELIVERY
